title: GTMoreMachine
description: Bring more interesting content to the GTM community
body:
**English Version:**
GTMM (GT More Machine) is a mod that provides convenient tools and additional content extensions for GTCeu Modern. This mod adds a series of chambers and items, including a wireless power system chamber, a wireless computation system, an advanced terminal for one-click construction and dismantling of machines, and more. In the future, we also plan to introduce more multi-block machines that better integrate with the core of GTCeu Modern. This mod is developed based on `gtmthings`, but extensive code modifications have been made, rendering it incompatible with the original mod.

**中文版本:**
GTMM（GT More Machine）是一个为 GTCeu Modern 提供便利工具与额外内容扩展的模组。此模组添加了一系列仓室和物品，包括无线电源系统仓室、无线算力系统、用于一键搭建和拆除机器的高级终端等。未来，我们还计划加入更多贴合 GTCeu Modern 本体的多方块机器。本模组基于 `gtmthings` 开发，但由于进行了大量的代码修改，导致其与原模组并不兼容。
